title: Senior Control & Automation Engineer
description:
We are looking for a passionate and experienced Senior Control & Automation Engineer to join our engineering team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in control panel design, system integration, and automation solutions for critical equipment in the oil & gas, marine, and industrial sectors.

Key Responsibilities:
1. Design and engineer control systems for:

(a) Generator Control Panels (synchronization, load sharing, paralleling control)

(b) Compressor Control Panels

(c) Fire Water Pump Control Systems

(d) Motor Control Center (MCC) & Distribution boards

2. Develop and prepare engineering deliverables such as:

(a) System architecture diagrams network architecture and industrial communication protocols (Modbus, Ethernet / IP, Profibus, etc.)

(b) General Arrangement (GA) drawings

(c) Control & Power Schematics

(d) Power distribution calculations

3. Involve in PLC/DCS programming, HMI configuration, and system FAT / SAT activities.

4. Ensure designs comply with industry standards, client specifications, and cybersecurity requirements.

5. Coordinate with cross-functional teams for procurement, panel fabrication, and site commissioning.

6. Provide technical support and troubleshooting during project execution and commissioning stages.

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Electrical / Electronics / Instrumentation / Automation Engineering.
  • Minimum 10 years of experience in automation systems for oil & gas, offshore, or industrial plants.
  • Strong knowledge in generator synchronization, load sharing, and control system logic.
  • Proficiency in AutoCAD / EPLAN for electrical design.
  • Hands-on experience with PLC programming (Siemens, Allen Bradley, Schneider, etc.).
  • Familiarity with IEC / API / ATEX standards and cybersecurity compliance is an advantage.
  • Good communication skills and the ability to work independently or as part of a team.

Added Advantage:

  • Knowledge & able to do with SCADA / HMI integration / PLC programming.

postedCompany.description: ROS is a dynamic, results-driven organization serving the evolving needs of the global Oil & Gas sector. We specialize in the engineering of custom-built compressors, generators, pumps, and separation systems. Proudly recognized as an E50 (Enterprises 50) Award for the last 4 years running, we are committed to excellence. We empower our team members to accelerate their career growth through comprehensive, knowledge-based training and a collaborative approach to performance management.
postedCompany.name: ROTATING OFFSHORE SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
